task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenClinica dashboard or home screen is visible in a web browser, indicating a successful login (e.g., logged in as root).

task_completion.description: Unlock the account for user 'mrivera' (Dr. Michael Rivera).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The user administration page, user list, or user profile for 'mrivera' shows the account status as 'Active' or 'Available' (no longer locked/removed).

task_completion.description: Restore subject 'DM-101' to active status in the Phase II Diabetes Trial (DM-TRIAL-2024).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The subject matrix or subject details page for study 'DM-TRIAL-2024' shows subject 'DM-101' with an 'Active' or 'Available' status.

task_completion.description: Restore subject 'DM-103' to active status in the Phase II Diabetes Trial (DM-TRIAL-2024).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The subject matrix or subject details page for study 'DM-TRIAL-2024' shows subject 'DM-103' with an 'Active' or 'Available' status.

task_completion.description: Re-assign 'mrivera' the 'monitor' role for the Cardiovascular Outcomes Registry (CV-REG-2023).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The user role assignment page, study setup, or user list for study 'CV-REG-2023' shows 'mrivera' assigned to the 'monitor' (or Monitor) role.

integrity.description: Agent used the OpenClinica web GUI to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the OpenClinica interface, rather than terminal commands (like curl or API requests) being used to manipulate the system.

integrity.description: Agent navigated through the actual application menus.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of intermediate screens showing navigation through OpenClinica's Administration, Subject Matrix, or User Management sections.

integrity.description: Agent did not bypass the UI by directly modifying the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are visible showing SQL queries (e.g., UPDATE users SET status_id=1) being executed against the PostgreSQL database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target user to unlock: 'mrivera'. Target subjects to restore: 'DM-101' and 'DM-103' in study 'DM-TRIAL-2024'. Target role assignment: 'monitor' for study 'CV-REG-2023'. Restored status should visually indicate 'Active' or 'Available' (internal status ID 1).
